message:
Polish TUI UX: word-jump navigation, richer empty states, and Unicode display fixes

Keyboard navigation:
- Add Ctrl+Left/Right for word-boundary cursor movement via new
  move_cursor_to_word_boundary() function
- Add Del key for forward-delete
- Esc now clears a non-empty query before quitting (matches fzf/omnibox UX)

Empty state improvements:
- Rich styled empty-state screens for "no results yet" (with query hints
  and keybinding tips), "searching..." spinner, "no results match" (with
  suggestions), and detail panel placeholder (with keybinding hints)
- Add is_empty() method and informative empty-state dashboard view to
  AnalyticsChartData when no analytics data is loaded

Unicode/display correctness:
- Char-boundary-aware text chunking in detail wrap mode
- Fixed highlight_query_spans forward-progress on non-ASCII text
- Switch from .len() (byte count) to display_width() (visual column count)
  in multiple rendering locations for proper Unicode rendering

HUD footer improvements:
- Add row position indicator
- Hide runtime/scope lanes when at default values
- Raise search performance "error" color threshold to >=1000ms

Minor:
- Fix clippy lint: pass function pointer directly instead of wrapping
  in closure for latest_release_version_blocking
- Update lifetime annotations from Line to Line<'_> for proper elision
- Updated snapshot tests to reflect new rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
